title: Problem with FTS aux. functions when used with OR queries with enhanced query syntax enabled
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_fts (content TEXT, tags TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_fts(content, tags) VALUES('Hello World', 'greeting');
INSERT INTO test_fts(content, tags) VALUES('SQLite is great', 'database');
SELECT * FROM test_fts WHERE content LIKE '%Hello%' OR tags LIKE '%database%';
SELECT * FROM test_fts WHERE content LIKE '%SQLite%' OR content LIKE '%World%';
key_bug_features: FTS aux. functions with OR queries enabled
